title: Analytics Engines: Technical Indicators, Greeks, and OI
objective: Compute real-time analytical factors (VWAP, EMA, RSI, Greeks, OI deltas) used by strike scoring and strategy decisions.
prd_mapping: Section 2: Greeks Calculation Engine, Technical Indicator Engine
Section 7: Technical Indicator, Greeks, OI Analytics engines
scope: Indicator computation from candles and LTP.
Store outputs in normalized analytics tables.
deliverables: Indicator service API and event publisher.
OI analytics processor with rolling windows.
Persisted metrics in s004_option_chain and s004_option_greeks.
success_metrics: Indicator update frequency matches 1-minute scoring cycle.
Greeks values verified against benchmark calculator within tolerance.
OI/volume spikes detected within one cycle.
risks: Computational load at high strike counts.
open_questions: Preferred IV source: broker feed, derived IV, or hybrid?
Do we compute Greeks for all strikes or filtered liquidity universe?
